title: LinkCardData
description: Rich link / Open-Graph preview payload. The card renders from this; it never fetches.

url.description: Canonical destination. Opened via the contract `open` verb (target 'tab').

title.description: OG title (og:title). Falls back to the domain when absent.

description.description: OG description (og:description). Clamped to 3 lines in the UI.

image.description: Preview image (og:image). Optional; the card degrades gracefully when missing or it fails to load.

imageAlt.description: Alt text for the preview image. Defaults to the title (or empty = decorative) when omitted.

favicon.description: Site favicon shown next to the domain.

domain.description: Display domain (e.g. 'example.com'). Derived from `url` when omitted.

siteName.description: OG site name (og:site_name). Shown in place of the domain when present.
